goal: Who won the most recent FIFA World Cup match and highlight important moments

subtasks.task: Determine the date and location of the most recent FIFA World Cup.
subtasks.result: The most recent FIFA World Cup was held in 2022 in Qatar. Argentina won the 2022 tournament. The next World Cup will be in 2026, hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the United States.

subtasks.task: Search for the final match result of that World Cup to identify the winner.
subtasks.result: The winner of the 2022 FIFA World Cup final was Argentina, who defeated France in a penalty shoot-out. The final match took place on December 18, 2022, in Lusail, Qatar.

subtasks.task: Search for detailed match summaries and key moments from the final game.
subtasks.result: The Knicks made a historic comeback in Game 4, overcoming a large deficit. Key moments included a crucial tip-in and Karl-Anthony Towns' step-back 3. The game showcased dramatic turnarounds and standout performances.

subtasks.task: Synthesize the gathered information to state the winner and list the most important moments.
subtasks.result: [stub] Tool not implemented for hint: none
